questions.question_text:
Arrange the words in the correct meaningful sentence:
masterpiece / artist / painstakingly / the / his / worked at

options.label: A
options.text: The artist painstakingly worked at his masterpiece.

options.label: B
options.text: The painstakingly artist worked at his masterpiece.

options.label: C
options.text: The artist at painstakingly worked his masterpiece.

options.label: D
options.text: The artist painstakingly worked his at masterpiece.

questions.correct_answer: The artist painstakingly worked at his masterpiece.
questions.explanation_text: The artist painstakingly worked at his masterpiece.

questions.question_text:
Arrange the words in the correct meaningful sentence:

options.text: Please do not step on the grass.

options.label: B
options.text: Do not step on the grass please.

options.label: C
options.text: Please step do not on the grass.

options.label: D
options.text: Please do step not on the grass.

questions.correct_answer: Please do not step on the grass.
questions.explanation_text: Please do not step on the grass.

questions.question_text:
